routinely participated in housekeeping tasks in the past (i.e., prior to this home care admission).
01 = Able to perform only light housekeeping (e.g., dusting, wiping kitchen counters) tasks independently.
02 = Able to perform housekeeping tasks with intermittent assistance or supervision from another person.
03 = Unable to consistently perform any housekeeping tasks unless assisted by another person throughout the process.
04 = Unable to effectively participate in any housekeeping
